# Code of Conduct

This project adopts the [Contributor Covenant v2.1](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/).

## Scope

Applies to all project spaces — GitHub issues, PRs, discussions, and any other official channel.

## Enforcement

Violations can be reported to the maintainer at the email listed in the GitHub profile.
Reports are reviewed confidentially.

For the full text of the Contributor Covenant v2.1, see:
https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/
